schema.purpose: BPHS Chapters 71-77 nakshatra-based predictions. Actionable rule schema with nakshatra key, planetary effects, timing predictions, effect domains, weight, cancellation conditions, translations and provenance.
schema.approximate_verses: shloka-level references are placeholders pending Pandit verification
schema.note: Each rule is keyed by `nakshatra_key`, matched against the app's nakshatra calculations via nakshatraEvidence(). `cancellation` lists classical conditions that modify nakshatra results; the app notes them but strength modifiers come from the shared exception engine.
schema.polarity: positive = beneficial nakshatra effect, negative = adverse nakshatra influence, mixed = conditional

conditions.desc: Planets in Ashwini nakshatra (Aries 0°-13°20') general effects

cancellation: Planet afflicted by Saturn/Rahu/Ketu
Planet in 6/8/12 from lagna
Planet combust or debilitated without neechabhanga

translations.en: Planets in Ashwini: Swift action, healing abilities, leadership, medical aptitude. Good for starting new ventures, sports, medicine.
translations.hi: अश्विनी में ग्रह: तीव्र कार्य, चिकित्सा क्षमता, नेतृत्व, चिकित्सा उन्मुखता। नए उपक्रम, खेल, चिकित्सा के लिए अनुकूल।

conditions.desc: Planets in Bharani nakshatra (Aries 13°20'-26°40') general effects

cancellation: Planet with benefic aspect reduces harshness
Planet in own sign or exalted
Planet in 6/8/12 without benefic support

translations.en: Planets in Bharani: Discipline, endurance, ability to handle crisis. Real estate, transformation, dealing with death/rebirth themes. Can be harsh if afflicted.
translations.hi: भरणी में ग्रह: अनुशासन, धीरज, संकट सामना करने की क्षमता। रियल एस्टेट, परिवर्तन, मृत्यु-पुनर्जन्म विषय। कष्टित होने पर कठोर हो सकता है।

conditions.desc: Planets in Krittika nakshatra (Aries 26°40'-Taurus 10°') general effects

cancellation: Planet with benefic aspect moderates aggression
Planet in Venus signs softens effects
Planet in 6/8/12 increases destructive tendencies

translations.en: Planets in Krittika: Sharp, cutting nature, courage, leadership. Fire, cooking, weapons, criticism. Can be aggressive or destructive if afflicted.
translations.hi: कृत्तिका में ग्रह: तीव्र, काटने वाली प्रकृति, साहस, नेतृत्व। अग्नि, भोजन, हथियार, आलोचना। कष्टित होने पर आक्रामक या विनाशकारी हो सकता है।

conditions.desc: Planets in Rohini nakshatra (Taurus 10°-23°20') general effects

cancellation: Planet afflicted by Mars/Saturn/Rahu
Planet in 6/8/12 from lagna
Planet combust

translations.en: Planets in Rohini: Growth, beauty, artistic talents, agriculture, fertility, luxury. Very auspicious for material prosperity and creative pursuits.
translations.hi: रोहिणी में ग्रह: वृद्धि, सौंदर्य, कलात्मक प्रतिभा, कृषि, प्रजनन, विलासिता। भौतिक समृद्धि और रचनात्मक गतिविधियों के लिए बहुत शुभ।

conditions.desc: Planets in Mrigashirsha nakshatra (Taurus 23°20'-Gemini 6°40') general effects

cancellation: Planet afflicted by Saturn increases restlessness
Planet in 12th house causes wasted efforts
Planet combust reduces discrimination

translations.en: Planets in Mrigashirsha: Research, investigation, travel, communication, intellectual pursuits. Desire for variety and exploration. Good for scholars, detectives.
translations.hi: मृगशिरा में ग्रह: अनुसंधान, जांच, यात्रा, संचार, बौद्धिक गतिविधियाँ। विविधता और अन्वेषण की इच्छा। विद्वानों, जासूसों के लिए अनुकूल।

conditions.desc: Planets in Ardra nakshatra (Gemini 6°40'-20°') general effects

cancellation: Planet with benefic aspect reduces destruction
Planet in 3/11 houses gives positive results
Planet in own sign or exalted

translations.en: Planets in Ardra: Destruction followed by renewal, intense research, technology, storms. Can bring sudden changes, emotional intensity. Good for scientific breakthroughs.
translations.hi: आर्द्रा में ग्रह: विनाश और फिर नवीनीकरण, तीव्र अनुसंधान, प्रौद्योगिकी, तूफान। अचानक बदलाव, भावनात्मक तीव्रता ला सकता है। वैज्ञानिक खोज के लिए अच्छा।

conditions.desc: Planets in Punarvasu nakshatra (Gemini 20°-Cancer 3°20') general effects

cancellation: Planet afflicted by Rahu/Ketu causes repeated cycles
Planet in 6/8/12 delays renewal
Planet combust reduces benefits

translations.en: Planets in Punarvasu: Return, renewal, family values, home, spirituality, prosperity. Ability to overcome obstacles and start fresh. Good for rehabilitation.
translations.hi: पुनर्वसु में ग्रह: वापसी, नवीनीकरण, पारिवारिक मूल्य, घर, आध्यात्मिकता, समृद्धि। बाधाओं को दूर करने और नए सिरे से शुरू करने की क्षमता। पुनर्वास के लिए अच्छा।

conditions.desc: Planets in Pushya nakshatra (Cancer 3°20'-16°40') general effects

cancellation: Planet afflicted by Saturn increases hardship
Planet in 6/8/12 without benefic aspect
Planet combust reduces nurturing qualities

translations.en: Planets in Pushya: Nurturing, caring, spiritual discipline, family bonds, wealth accumulation. Highly auspicious for spiritual growth and material prosperity.
translations.hi: पुष्य में ग्रह: पोषण, देखभाल, आध्यात्मिक अनुशासन, पारिवारिक बंधन, धन संचय। आध्यात्मिक वृद्धि और भौतिक समृद्धि के लिए बहुत शुभ।

conditions.desc: Planets in Ashlesha nakshatra (Cancer 16°40'-30°') general effects

cancellation: Planet with benefic aspect reduces manipulation
Planet in 3/11 houses gives positive outcomes
Planet in own sign or exalted

translations.en: Planets in Ashlesha: Deep attachment, entanglement, research, occult knowledge, psychology. Can involve manipulation if afflicted. Good for psychologists, researchers.
translations.hi: आश्लेषा में ग्रह: गहरी लगाव, जटिलता, अनुसंधान, अधिभौतिक ज्ञान, मनोविज्ञान। कष्टित होने पर हेरफेर हो सकता है। मनोवैज्ञानिकों, शोधकर्ताओं के लिए अच्छा।

conditions.desc: Planets in Magha nakshatra (Leo 0°-13°20') general effects

cancellation: Planet afflicted by Saturn/Rahu causes ego issues
Planet in 6/8/12 without benefic aspect
Planet combust reduces authority

translations.en: Planets in Magha: Authority, tradition, ancestral connection, leadership, power, status. Respect for elders and traditional values. Good for leadership positions.
translations.hi: माघा में ग्रह: प्राधिकरण, परंपरा, पूर्वजों से संबंध, नेतृत्व, शक्ति, पद। बड़ों का सम्मान और पारंपरिक मूल्य। नेतृत्व पदों के लिए अच्छा।

conditions.desc: Planets in Purva Phalguni nakshatra (Leo 13°20'-26°40') general effects

cancellation: Planet afflicted by Mars causes relationship issues
Planet in 6/8/12 without benefic support
Planet combust reduces social charm

translations.en: Planets in Purva Phalguni: Creativity, relationships, luxury, artistic pursuits, social status, partnerships. Good for marriage, entertainment, social activities.
translations.hi: पूर्व फाल्गुनी में ग्रह: रचनात्मकता, संबंध, विलासिता, कलात्मक गतिविधियाँ, सामाजिक पद, साझेदारी। विवाह, मनोरंजन, सामाजिक गतिविधियों के लिए अच्छा।

conditions.desc: Planets in Uttara Phalguni nakshatra (Leo 26°40'-Virgo 10°') general effects

cancellation: Planet afflicted by Saturn increases burden
Planet in 6/8/12 delays results
Planet combust reduces effectiveness

translations.en: Planets in Uttara Phalguni: Service orientation, charity, stability, responsibility, career growth, marriage. Good for professional success and stable relationships.
translations.hi: उत्तर फाल्गुनी में ग्रह: सेवा भावना, दान, स्थिरता, जिम्मेदारी, करियर वृद्धि, विवाह। पेशेवर सफलता और स्थिर संबंधों के लिए अच्छा।

conditions.desc: Planets in Hasta nakshatra (Virgo 10°-23°20') general effects

cancellation: Planet afflicted by Mars causes accidents
Planet in 6/8/12 without benefic aspect
Planet combust reduces skill

translations.en: Planets in Hasta: Skill, craftsmanship, intelligence, communication, business acumen, healing. Good for artists, craftsmen, merchants, healers.
translations.hi: हस्त में ग्रह: कौशल, शिल्पकारी, बुद्धिमत्ता, संचार, व्यापारिक कुशलता, चिकित्सा। कलाकारों, शिल्पकारों, व्यापारियों, चिकित्सकों के लिए अच्छा।

conditions.desc: Planets in Chitra nakshatra (Virgo 23°20'-Libra 6°40') general effects

cancellation: Planet afflicted by Saturn delays creative expression
Planet in 6/8/12 without benefic aspect
Planet combust reduces aesthetic sense

translations.en: Planets in Chitra: Creativity, design, architecture, jewelry, beauty, strategic thinking. Good for designers, architects, artists, strategists.
translations.hi: चित्रा में ग्रह: रचनात्मकता, डिजाइन, वास्तुकला, आभूषण, सौंदर्य, रणनीतिक सोच। डिजाइनरों, वास्तुकारों, कलाकारों, रणनीतिकारों के लिए अच्छा।

conditions.desc: Planets in Swati nakshatra (Libra 6°40'-20°') general effects

cancellation: Planet afflicted by Rahu causes instability
Planet in 12th house causes excessive wandering
Planet combust reduces discrimination

translations.en: Planets in Swati: Independence, flexibility, travel, business, adaptability, communication. Good for entrepreneurs, traders, travelers. Can bring restlessness if ungrounded.
translations.hi: स्वाति में ग्रह: स्वतंत्रता, लचीलापन, यात्रा, व्यापार, अनुकूलन, संचार। उद्यमियों, व्यापारियों, यात्रियों के लिए अच्छा। बिना आधार के अशांति ला सकता है।

conditions.desc: Planets in Vishakha nakshatra (Libra 20°-Scorpio 3°20') general effects

cancellation: Planet with benefic aspect reduces aggression
Planet in 3/11 houses gives positive results
Planet in own sign or exalted

translations.en: Planets in Vishakha: Determination, ambition, competitive spirit, leadership, politics, research. Can be aggressive or ruthless in achieving goals. Good for competitive fields.
translations.hi: विशाखा में ग्रह: दृढ़ता, महत्वाकांक्षा, प्रतिस्पर्धा, नेतृत्व, राजनीति, अनुसंधान। लक्ष्य प्राप्ति में आक्रामक या निर्दय हो सकता है। प्रतिस्पर्धी क्षेत्रों के लिए अच्छा।

conditions.desc: Planets in Anuradha nakshatra (Scorpio 3°20'-16°40') general effects

cancellation: Planet afflicted by Mars causes conflicts
Planet in 6/8/12 without benefic aspect
Planet combust reduces organizational ability

translations.en: Planets in Anuradha: Friendship, discipline, organization, research, mathematics, devotion. Good for managers, researchers, mathematicians. Can bring success through cooperation.
translations.hi: अनुराधा में ग्रह: मित्रता, अनुशासन, संगठन, अनुसंधान, गणित, भक्ति। प्रबंधकों, शोधकर्ताओं, गणितज्ञों के लिए अच्छा। सहयोग से सफलता ला सकता है।

conditions.desc: Planets in Jyeshtha nakshatra (Scorpio 16°40'-30°') general effects

cancellation: Planet with benefic aspect reduces aggression
Planet in 3/11 houses gives positive results
Planet in own sign or exalted

translations.en: Planets in Jyeshtha: Leadership, authority, courage, protection, mystical interests, power. Can be dominant or arrogant. Good for positions of authority and protection roles.
translations.hi: ज्येष्ठा में ग्रह: नेतृत्व, प्राधिकरण, साहस, सुरक्षा, रहस्यमयी रुचि, शक्ति। प्रभावशाली या अहंकारी हो सकता है। प्राधिकरण पदों और सुरक्षा भूमिकाओं के लिए अच्छा।

conditions.desc: Planets in Moola nakshatra (Sagittarius 0°-13°20') general effects

cancellation: Planet with benefic aspect reduces destructive tendency
Planet in 3/11 houses gives positive results
Planet in own sign or exalted

translations.en: Planets in Mulla: Connection to roots, foundations, research, philosophy, destruction and renewal, spiritual pursuits. Can bring radical changes. Good for researchers, philosophers.
translations.hi: मूल में ग्रह: जड़ों से संबंध, नींव, अनुसंधान, दर्शन, विनाश और नवीनीकरण, आध्यात्मिक गतिविधियाँ। बुनियादी बदलाव ला सकता है। शोधकर्ताओं, दार्शनिकों के लिए अच्छा।

conditions.desc: Planets in Purva Ashadha nakshatra (Sagittarius 13°20'-26°40') general effects

cancellation: Planet afflicted by Saturn delays success
Planet in 6/8/12 without benefic aspect
Planet combust reduces victory

translations.en: Planets in Purva Ashadha: Victory, ambition, leadership, communication, diplomacy, expansion. Good for military, politics, business expansion. Can overcome obstacles.
translations.hi: पूर्वाषाढ़ा में ग्रह: विजय, महत्वाकांक्षा, नेतृत्व, संचार, कूटनीति, विस्तार। सैन्य, राजनीति, व्यापार विस्तार के लिए अच्छा। बाधाओं को दूर कर सकता है।
